summary: 8 synthesized trends from the latest committed Hot Topics snapshot. The strongest lanes are foundation world models, autonomous-driving simulation, low-cost robot manipulation, embodied AI models, physical reasoning benchmarks, OpenUSD/digital twins, and robotics simulation.

sourceCoverage.notes: Committed baseline uses Hacker News only. The upgraded refresh now filters stale/off-topic matches and adds arXiv, YouTube, GitHub activity, and public RSS feeds on the next scheduled run.

topTrends.whatPeopleAreSaying: Developers are treating world models as the next simulation layer for physical AI: generated, controllable environments that can train and evaluate agents before real-world deployment.
topTrends.whyItMatters: This moves simulation from hand-authored scenes toward learned physical priors and raises the bar for evaluation, synthetic data, and sim-to-real workflows.
topTrends.nvidiaRelevance: Directly aligned with Cosmos, GR00T, Isaac Sim, Isaac Lab, Omniverse, and OpenUSD.
topTrends.recommendedAction: Publish a source-backed world-model explainer that connects Cosmos, GR00T, Isaac Sim, and Isaac Lab to the developer workflow.
topTrends.next7Days: Validate the top evidence links and draft a one-page world-model listening note for developer relations.
topTrends.next30Days: Ship a tutorial or benchmark plan that tests generated simulation against robot-policy performance.

topTrends.whatPeopleAreSaying: AV developers are watching learned simulation and world models as a potential shortcut for scenario generation and safety validation.
topTrends.whyItMatters: If the discussion holds, AV simulation messaging will shift from photorealism alone to controllable, scalable, safety-relevant scenario synthesis.
topTrends.nvidiaRelevance: Maps to DriveOS, Alpamayo, Halos, Cosmos, Omniverse, and AV simulation workflows.
topTrends.recommendedAction: Coordinate an AV simulation deep dive that maps world-model discussion to DriveOS, Alpamayo, Halos, and Cosmos validation stories.
topTrends.next7Days: Collect the strongest AV simulation links and route them to AV dev-rel for review.
topTrends.next30Days: Prepare a co-marketed technical brief on learned simulation and safety validation.

actionQueue.action: Publish a world-model explainer tying Cosmos, GR00T, Isaac Sim, Isaac Lab, Omniverse, and OpenUSD into one developer workflow.
Create an AV simulation brief connecting world models to DriveOS, Alpamayo, Halos, and Cosmos validation.

knownGaps: Reddit is not scraped because unauthenticated JSON endpoints return 403 from GitHub Actions runners.
Private Discord, Slack, and LinkedIn conversations are not scraped; any use should be permissioned or manually curated.
Committed baseline was Hacker News-only; the upgraded pipeline will broaden the source mix on the next full refresh.
Industrial Digital Twin and CAE coverage needs more stable public RSS/source records.
